channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Evals are the new PRD, Expedia’s AI chief tells VB Transform 2026
item.description: “The new PRD are the evals,” Xavi Amatriain, Expedia Group’s first chief AI and data officer, told the VB Transform 2026 audience last week in Menlo Park. “So basically, you encode what you want the product to do through your evals, which might include red teaming evals and all kinds of other things, which already have a bunch of security requirements. So, you already embed that into the PRD and the product design document before you even start coding.”He pushed it further. “With AI-assisted or AI-generated code, that’s gonna be the future. It’s like all your thinking is gonna go into the eval...

item.title: Trump’s head of AI safety agency just resigned, but he was only on the job for three months
item.description: Chris Fall was only in the job for three months before resigning, and no reason has been provided for his departure.

item.title: Data centers expected to use 4x more electricity by 2035
item.description: New data centers built through 2033 could consume as much electricity as India uses today.

item.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
item.description: The company didn't say how many are in each city, and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

item.title: The Xteink X4 Pro is a tiny ereader with more features than you might expect
item.description: The Xteink X4 Pro is a tiny ereader for DRM-free books.

item.title: UK government says plug-in solar panels will be legal from August 27 — opening the door for Amazon, Lidl, Currys and more to help save you £110 a year
item.description: The UK government has quietly revealed when plug-in solar panels will become legal in the country —here's what that means.

item.title: Apple may unveil a new device subscription service as soon as next week
item.description: Apple may unveil a new device subscription service, reportedly in partnership with Klarna, as soon as next week.

item.title: Amazon is making a Robocop TV show with the showrunner from Lodge 49
item.description: Amazon greenlit a Robocop pilot. Now it has committed to a full TV show.

item.title: Here's what that trash can with an X icon means on your electronics
item.description: It's the official marking of the EU's Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment Directive.

item.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
item.description: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

item.title: Experts warn hackers could shut down entire power grids by hijacking cloud accounts
item.description: AI training can create spikes in energy consumption, and these can cause all sorts of harm to a power grid.

item.title: Stay powered up in any storm with 42% off the Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus
item.description: As of July 21, save 42% on the Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus at Amazon.

item.title: 'Can't fault the HEDDphone D1 in any meaningful way': HEDD's progeny are emphatically excellent wired headphones at a not-unreasonable price
item.description: The HEDDphone D1 headphones are a stunning pair of mid-budget over-ears, with a proprietary driver design that kills audiophile-grade options three times the price

item.title: Amazon has Dreame beauty devices on sale for some of the best prices weve ever seen
item.description: Amazon has Dreame beauty devices on sale for up to 20% off including the Dreame Chrona Photon LED mask and IPL mask.

item.title: Pornhub traffic tanked in Spain and Argentina during World Cup final
item.description: Pornhub measured traffic during the World Cup final in several countries, including Spain and Argentina.

item.title: This popular simulator game has thousands of positive Steam reviews — and it drops on consoles later this month
item.description: This viral waterpark simulator game is coming to consoles soon.

item.title: 'I can't say anything officially, but it doesn't feel like a crazy bet' — Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced director can't confirm post-launch content, but hopes fans continue playing even after GTA 6 comes out
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced game director Richard Knight hopes players will continue playing the game after Grand Theft Auto 6 releases.

item.title: Le Pass Ulys Télépage ne vous coûtera rien pendant 1 an grâce à cette offre qui tombe à pic pour les départs en vacances
item.description: Si vous ne voulez plus perdre de temps aux péages sur la route des vacances, un badge de télépéage est indispensable. Bonne nouvelle, Ulys offre actuellement 12 mois d'abonnement à son pass Télépéage.

item.title: Oh thank goodness: the ATSC has updated its rules on TV advertising volume limits to include streaming ads
item.description: The broadcast standards association the ATSC has published revised guidance that sets out loudness levels for streaming as well as broadcast ads

item.title: The best Apple deals this week include up to $500 off an M5 MacBook Pro or M3 iPad Air
item.description: As of July 21, we rounded up the best deals on Apple products. We found all the best savings on iPads, iPhones, MacBooks, and more.

item.title: How to connect your Ring doorbell camera to your smart TV
item.description: It's easy to see who's at the door without grabbing your phone.

item.title: Test de l’écran Nothing Projector Matte White : la toile blanche mate pour une image plus lumineuse mais moins contrastée
item.description: L'écran Nothing Projector Matte White, motorisé à montée depuis le sol, propose une approche radicalement différente des toiles ALR habituellement associées aux vidéoprojecteurs ultra courte focale. Nous l'avons testé.
